verdict.answer_first: A and B both answer first: A says "A hydration mismatch means...", B says the same; neither buries the core definition.
verdict.decisiveness: A is slightly more decisive: "The fastest way to find it" gives one diagnostic path; B expands into "Typical fixes" with 4 options.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on because it includes a concrete mounted-flag snippet and specific fixes like "next/dynamic" and fixed timezone/locale.
